title: Xylem real-usage timeline
description: An ordered, real-usage event timeline for the Xylem explainer, reconstructed from actual agentsync board history (claims.json commit log on the agentsync branch) and context-keeper decision records. Three interleaved storylines: a Balatron audit-to-fix-to-remeasure arc, a parallel two-agent cambium session, and a connector-outage incident handled by proxy claim. Real task names preserved; no secrets included.

storylines.balatron-audit-fix-remeasure: Balatron audit -> dec-061 LR recycle-reset fix -> dec-058 re-measure launch -> crawl-livelock investigation -> dec-063/dec-064 fixes
storylines.parallel-two-agent: cambium first real cycle (jonny-desktop) and cambium onboarding v1 (jonny-mobile) claimed and completed simultaneously with non-overlapping touches
storylines.connector-outage: agentsync connector dropped for the mobile sandbox; the session held discipline via a proxy claim staked by the chat session, released with a truthful handoff note

events.summary: Recorded dec-058: Tier-0 optimizer hygiene from the plateau audit — LR locked at 1e-4, ratio-bomb guard, per-minibatch KL stop, value-norm stats persisted
Recorded dec-059: boss-aware planner v1 — build_survivability gates the immediate ante at the known boss's real difficulty (the audit's top ~5x lever)
Recorded dec-060: save->spike economy v1 — reroll-to-assemble raised to 0.25 and interest floor relaxed to $10 before a hard boss, the power-side companion to dec-059
Claimed 'balatron work session - 2026-07-09' to audit whether dec-058/059/060 are actually working on live training
Released audit: dec-058 partially working (LR resets on recycle), dec-059 modest boss kills, dec-060 no outcome lift; win rate 0.48% flat; top next action is trace the LR recycle-reset bug
Claimed 'balatron - trace LR recycle-reset bug (dec-058 follow-up)' to chase the LR that keeps reverting on supervisor recycle
Recorded dec-061: root cause is load_checkpoint restoring a stale 2.7e-4 LR from the optimizer state_dict; fix adds an lr_override that re-asserts 1e-4 right after optimizer.load_state_dict
Released LR trace+fix: 3/3 new tests pass, full suite 122 pass; recommended next is a training run to re-measure dec-058's real effect with the LR lock holding
Claimed 'balatron - dec-058 remeasure training launch' to relaunch training from a dec-061-fixed checkpoint
Committed dashboard regime boundary at update 3749 ('dec-058 remeasure, LR fixed') so the re-measure is cleanly separable from prior training

Released remeasure launch: started from balatron_phase1_update003748.pt (includes dec-061 fix), heartbeat healthy ~120 steps/min; check in ~24h for win-rate lift and that LR holds 1e-4 after first recycle
Claimed 'cambium first real cycle' (touches: knowledge substrates only, no balatron code) — running cambium end-to-end on balatron history
Claimed 'cambium onboarding v1 (status/setup/fail-helpful)' (touches: cambium/** code) simultaneously with the desktop cycle — non-overlapping paths, no conflict
Released 'cambium onboarding v1' — helpful first contact (status / setup / fail-helpful when unconfigured) shipped via cambium PR #4

Recorded cambium dec-001: first real end-to-end knowledge cycle on balatron history (distill 80 items -> recall -> promote 22 to team -> endorse -> org PRs #1/#2 -> cross-project recall from the Clark project); federation validated
Released 'cambium first real cycle' — DONE end-to-end on balatron history, NO balatron code touched (knowledge substrates only); completed alongside the mobile onboarding claim with zero contention
Claimed 'balatron: investigate training crawl loop' — the remeasure run made zero checkpoint progress overnight (601 CRAWL recycles, ~20h)

Released crawl root cause (read-only, no code changes): two-layer livelock — INVALID_STATE poll-spin against the game state machine, plus checkpoint-interval-2 + recycle-before-save meaning the trainer never reaches update 3750 to save
Claimed 'balatron: fix crawl livelock (checkpoint-on-teardown + INVALID_STATE trace)' to ship the two fixes

Recorded dec-063: checkpoint-crawl livelock breaker — wall-clock SAFETY checkpoint (>=480s) in the update loop, graceful SIGINT/SIGTERM/SIGBREAK handlers, and an untagged teardown save the supervisor can reload
Committed 'fix: break checkpoint-crawl livelock (wall-clock safety ckpt + untagged teardown save)', pushed to origin/main

Recorded dec-064: INVALID_STATE desync — the execute_action retry loop now re-reads live game state and aborts a stale action immediately instead of burning all 3 retries + backoff into the wrong state
Committed 'fix: stop burning retries on INVALID_STATE desync (abort stale actions fast)', pushed to origin/main
Released crawl-livelock fixes: both shipped and pushed (b57b602 + b0a3a48), 146 tests pass, dec-063 + dec-064 recorded; supervisor picks up the new code on next recycle

Proxy claim staked by the chat session on behalf of the mobile CC session whose agentsync connector had dropped: 'cambium: export_markdown + mojibake fix' — discipline held, no work without a board claim

Released with a truthful note: export_markdown shipped via cambium PR #5 (renderer + cp1252 mojibake fix + tests), but the live org run was NOT done (sandbox has no CAMBIUM_ORG_REPO); handed to jonny-desktop to run it after merge
Claimed 'cambium: live KNOWLEDGE.md export' — desktop picks up the handoff to run export_markdown against the real org clone

Released 'cambium: live KNOWLEDGE.md export' — all 9 org items present and clean (the mojibake fix's first field test passed), pushed to the knowledge repo; the proxy-covered handoff is fully resolved
